title: Grit Studio Run Launch Source Boundary
forbids: missing closed Run in Game launch source contract or runtime-owned source resolution boundary
why: Packet 5 makes the public Run in Game start request a closed launch-source envelope and moves catalog/editor source realization behind the operation runtime.
remediate: Keep runInGame.start shaped as { source, recipeSettings, worldSettings } and route all launch-source realization through the studio-server operation runtime resolver.
message: Run in Game launch-source ownership drifted from the closed public contract and runtime resolver boundary.
